problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
